description_long: This vending machine is a tall, rectangular unit with a predominantly white exterior. The front face features two rows of product images, showcasing a variety of bottled and canned beverages, along with a prominent illuminated display panel in the lower center. Below the display, there is a black product retrieval slot, and to the right, a payment interface with a card reader and possibly a bill acceptor. The sides of the machine are mostly plain, with a few small stickers or decals visible, and the back is unadorned. The machine appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with some plastic components for the display, buttons, and retrieval slot. Its overall design is functional and typical for urban beverage vending machines.
description: A tall, white vending machine with beverage images, a display panel, payment interface, and product retrieval slot on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing beverage images, display panel, payment interface, and product retrieval slot.
description_view_1: Left side view, mostly plain with a few small stickers or decals.
description_view_2: Rear view, completely plain and unadorned.
description_view_3: Right side view, plain with some visible scuff marks or stains.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular illuminated display panel is located on the lower center of the front face, showing a product image and some text.
attribute_payment_interface: A payment interface is present on the right side of the front face, featuring a card reader and possibly a bill acceptor.
attribute_product_selection_buttons: Individual product selection buttons are visible next to each product image on the front face.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A wide, black rectangular product retrieval slot is located below the display panel on the front face.
attribute_branding_or_signage: Branding and signage include colorful stickers and a large product image on the display panel, with some visible text and graphics on the front.
